character.description: 6-year-old boy, olive skin, curly dark brown hair, green eyes, wearing a red striped shirt, blue shorts, and brown leather sandals
character.name: TestChild

style: soft watercolor children's book illustration, warm lighting, gentle shadows, storybook style, muted earthy palette
negative_prompt: photorealistic, scary, dark, blurry, deformed hands, extra fingers, text, watermark, multiple children
composition_rules: plain neutral background, character-focused framing, no story setting, full and clear view of the character
training_prompts: head and shoulders portrait, front-facing, neutral expression, plain cream background
head and shoulders portrait, three-quarter view turning slightly to the left, soft smile, plain cream background
head and shoulders portrait, three-quarter view turning slightly to the right, neutral expression looking forward, plain cream background
waist-up shot, standing straight with hands at sides, plain soft gray background
head and shoulders portrait, full side profile facing left, neutral expression, plain cream background
waist-up shot from a slightly low angle, looking down toward the camera, plain soft gray background
full body, standing relaxed with arms by sides, plain white background
full body, mid-stride walking pose looking forward, plain white background
full body, sitting cross-legged with hands in lap, plain white background
full body, kneeling with one knee down looking forward, plain white background
head and shoulders portrait, broad genuine smile showing teeth, eyes lively, plain cream background
head and shoulders portrait, curious thoughtful expression, looking forward, plain cream background
